I can not reproduce your problem. 

The Port builds fine. 
https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/20130329075400-41346/ 

> ===>   graphviz-2.30.1 depends on shared library: png15grep: writing output: Broken pipe 
> grep: writing output: Broken pipe 

It looks like one of the dependeies is broken, 
or something in the build system is corrupted.
